mechanics.excerpt: For example_ there is no question that your character would be capable of walking ' down the street, picking C-bill note off the ground ad putting it in his pocket: Such simple and trivial tasks require no rules to govern them and can de assumed t0 be automatically successful. Wnen character tries t0 do something and the gamemas- ter feels that the result of the action I5 both uncertain and important t0 the game then the rules intervene t0 determine whether the action is successful or not.
